metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Privacy policy and personal data processing information for andrealosavio.com

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content: The data controller is Andrea Losavio, VAT number 12705460967. For any questions regarding the processing of your personal data, you can contact me at info@andrealosavio.com.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data Collected
dataCollected.content: Through the contact form on this website, we collect the following personal data:

items.message: Message content (description of your challenge or request)

dataCollected.note: This data is provided voluntarily by the user when filling out and submitting the contact form.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.content: Your personal data is processed exclusively for the following purposes:

items.confirmation: Sending a confirmation email that your message has been received

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis
legalBasis.content: The processing of your data is based on your explicit consent, provided by checking the consent checkbox before submitting the contact form (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

dataProcessing.title: 5. How Data is Processed
dataProcessing.content: The data submitted through the contact form is processed using Resend, a third-party email delivery service, which is used to send the confirmation email to you and the notification email to the data controller. Resend processes data in accordance with its own privacy policy and acts as a data processor on our behalf.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: Your personal data is retained only for the time strictly necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected (i.e., responding to your request). Once the purpose has been fulfilled, the data will be deleted unless retention is required by law.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.access: Right of access – to know what data we hold about you
items.rectification: Right to rectification – to correct inaccurate data
items.erasure: Right to erasure – to request deletion of your data
items.objection: Right to object to the processing of your data
items.withdraw: Right to withdraw consent at any time

rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact me at info@andrealosavio.com.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.content: This website does not use profiling cookies. Only technical cookies strictly necessary for the proper functioning of the website may be used.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated revision date.
